data.information:
American Red Cross sheltering options will remain available for affected residents. For questions, you may call the American Red Cross at 1-800-733-2767. As a reminder the shelter is located at The Church at Bushland, 1800 S FM 2381, Bushland, TX.

Per Amarillo Fire Department
